texto: As the earth dies your spirit will bloom
autor: as the world fades your soul will rise and glisten. Amongst the dehydrated crevices of a desert earth you will stumble upon your diamonds
explicacao: Citação de as the world fades your soul will rise and glisten. Amongst the dehydrated crevices of a desert earth you will stumble upon your diamonds sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “As the earth dies your spirit will bloom” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
